title: 要件定義：奇跡を数値化する

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after classes have finished, I hear voices
coming from inside the gym. I peek inside and
find...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Pay more attention to where the spotlight is
shining. And you're walking too early too.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! I do apologize! I dazzle so
spectacularly that mere lighting escapes the eye!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Focus on moving the spotlight faster, Doto.
You're not keepin' up with Opera O.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
R-right! I'll do my best!
Be faster! Be faster!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Huh?!
Hell no! Don't get any weird ideas!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Actually, T.M. Opera O is the only person up on
the stage. Air Shakur must be helping backstage
with the sound and lighting.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Wishing to capture me in the dazzling cage of the
spotlight is the most natural thing in the world!
'Tis a fearsome thing, this charm of mine, capable
of bringing the entire world to its knees!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's for sure! You've even got Shakur so
dazzled and impressed that she's helping out.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Wrong. Dead wrong. How many times do I have
to say it?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to bother over every little detail.
Damn...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Fine. If you're that curious, just watch the full rehearsal. It's about time we factor in the audience factor anyway.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Get ready, you two. It's time to begin the code
review process.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their opera is so incredibly well put together, I
can hardly believe it was created by just three
people.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, I can never be satisfied for even a moment,
no matter how glorious. The paragon of beauty
that is myself is a thing that must be shared with
as many as possible!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Three, two, one.
Aaand, fade out in ten...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O moves across the stage illuminated
by a laser-focused spotlight, each step
resounding through the space as if struck on
stone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the next instant, a vast ocean appears. A flood
of lights and the sound of crashing waves make
the empty stage suddenly come alive.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Time, I command thee stand still! Behold my
beauty!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And now, fade to black.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: There you have it. Thoughts?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Right? I meticulously calculated every aspect so
as to create a feeling of immersion, pulling the
audience directly into the world on stage.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What a masterpiece! With your direction, we've
somehow managed to draw out my radiant charm
even further—exactly as one would polish a
gemstone!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea you could do that with sound and
lighting. You really helped us out!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I didn't do any of this to help you. I just wanted to
prove a theory I had.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to test if my logic would prevail even in
the chaotic world of the arts. I wish you'd all get
that through your heads.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Tch. Now, that's enough useless blabber. Let's
keep running tests until it's time for the real
performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears the real reason Air Shakur has decided
to help with the show isn't due to kindness, but
rather the desire to prove a theory. All the same...
choice_data_list: You've really been working hard, huh?
You've really been working hard, huh?
You should keep helping until the show opens!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears the real reason Air Shakur has decided
to help with the show isn't due to kindness, but
rather the desire to prove a theory. All the same...
choice_data_list: You've really been working hard, huh?
You've really been working hard, huh?
You should keep helping until the show opens!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of intentions, pulling off this level of
perfection is no ordinary feat. I tell her it seems
she's put in no small effort, but...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Spare me the cliches. Putting forth the effort
necessary to achieve a goal should go without
saying.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
B-but... you've come to so many rehearsals. It
really feels like we accomplished this together.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Actually, well, I know what you must be thinking!
What right does someone as useless as me have
to say that, right? Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh. For the love of...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, it turned out all right. If we can keep up
this quality until opening day, I'll call you back to
reprise your role as an audience member.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not easy to tell, but Air Shakur seems
somewhat pleased.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, yeah. Even if I tried to back out now,
Doto'd never give me a moment's peace.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Not only that, I would come to recruit you once
again! It's rare to find such a magnificent
backstage talent! I wouldn't dream of letting you
slip through my fingers.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
See? Sticking it out to the end is the logical
choice. I've factored that in from the very
beginning.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: No other reason.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur seeing this play through until the end
admittedly shows a bit of her caring side. Or at
least that's how it seems to me!
